overview: The Wausau Board of Public Works held a brief meeting to open bids and award the 2026 asphalt paving project. RC Pavers was selected as the winning bidder at $824,146.34, the lower of two bids received.
presiding: Not identified by name in transcript

agenda.item: Open bids and make recommendation for the 2026 asphalt paving project

discussions.body: Two bids were opened for the 2026 asphalt paving project. RC Pavers submitted the low bid at $824,146.34, while American submitted a bid of $849,872.10. A motion was made to approve RC Pavers as the winning bidder, which was seconded and passed unanimously with all members voting 'aye.'

actionItems: RC Pavers awarded the 2026 asphalt paving project contract at $824,146.34
title: Wausau Board of Public Works Meeting - 3/19/2026 - 3/19/2026 - 3/19/2026 - 3/19/2026
